compressed_prompt:
Titan makes clothing for large men. Write an advertisement for the company that would appeal to a wide audience. Make sentences short. Your response should not contain any comma.
create ad for Titan's large men's clothing no commas wide appeal
response: Titan clothes big guys with style. We make shirts that fit. Our pants are comfortable. We have jackets for every occasion. Titan is for men who want to look good. We have clothes in all sizes. Our clothes are made to last. Titan is the best choice for big men. We care about our customers. Titan is for you.
